attributes.title: [etcd OTel] Storage & MVCC
attributes.description: Storage metrics: DB size vs quota, MVCC operations, compaction, watchers, and disk usage.

params.markdown:
## [etcd OTel] Storage & MVCC

Storage and key-value layer metrics:
- DB size vs quota (critical saturation indicator)
- MVCC operation rates (put, range, delete, txn)
- Compaction and defragmentation
- Watchers, watch streams, and lease operations

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes))
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes))
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS keys = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS keys = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS watchers = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS watchers = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total))

attributes.title: DB Size vs Quota by Instance

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes)) BY instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota
| SORT pct DESC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes)) BY instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota
| SORT pct DESC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: DB Size In Use vs Total by Instance

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL | STATS size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL type = "total" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_use_in_bytes IS NOT NULL | STATS size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_use_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL type = "in_use" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL | STATS size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL type = "total" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_use_in_bytes IS NOT NULL | STATS size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_use_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL type = "in_use" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_put_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_put_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "put" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_range_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_range_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "range" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_delete_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_delete_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "delete" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_txn_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_txn_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "txn" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_put_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_put_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "put" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_range_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_range_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "range" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_delete_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_delete_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "delete" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_txn_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_txn_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "txn" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Watchers and Watch Streams by Instance

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total IS NOT NULL | STATS count = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "watchers" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_watch_stream_total IS NOT NULL | STATS count = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_watch_stream_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "streams" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total IS NOT NULL | STATS count = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_watcher_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "watchers" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_watch_stream_total IS NOT NULL | STATS count = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_watch_stream_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "streams" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total IS NOT NULL | STATS value = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "keys" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_current_revision IS NOT NULL | STATS value = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_current_revision)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "revision" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total IS NOT NULL | STATS value = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_keys_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "keys" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_mvcc_current_revision IS NOT NULL | STATS value = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_debugging_mvcc_current_revision)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id | EVAL metric = "revision" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_debugging_lease_granted_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_lease_granted_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "granted" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_lease_renewed_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_lease_renewed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "renewed" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_lease_revoked_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_lease_revoked_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "revoked" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_server_lease_expired_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_server_lease_expired_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "expired" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_debugging_lease_granted_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_lease_granted_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "granted" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_lease_renewed_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_lease_renewed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "renewed" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_lease_revoked_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_lease_revoked_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "revoked" ) ( WHERE etcd_debugging_server_lease_expired_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_debugging_server_lease_expired_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "expired" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC
